name: Baked Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 to 1/2 cup bottled key lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 325°F.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, mix together the sweetened condensed milk and egg yolks until well-blended.
3. Slowly stir in the key lime juice (for more tart flavor, use 1/2 cup), stirring gently just until blended.
4. Pour into pie crust and bake for 10 minutes.
5. Allow to cool at room temperature, then chill before serving.
6. Top with whipped cream if desired. I think it's best with the whipped cream. Note: This recipe leaves room in the crust for whipped cream. If more filling is desired, increase the filling proportions by half.
